description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and publish. In the test stage add a run-fitnesse-test job that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image, runs only on the master branch, executes the Maven command mvn clean install -B -P start-demo-test -DskipTests=false -DforkCount=1, then after the script copies target/fitnesse-test-results/TestSuite.html to target/fitnesse-test-results/index.html, and stores the target/fitnesse-test-results directory as an artifact that expires in one day. In the publish stage add a pages job that runs only on master, always runs, depends on run-fitnesse-test, moves target/fitnesse-test-results to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in one day.
